---
title: "Parameter estimation for fractional power type diffusion: A hybrid Bayesian-deep learning approach"
author: "Araya, H.; Plaza-Vega, F."
date: '2023-01-02'
date-format: "YYYY"
slug: fractional-power-diffusion-bayesian-deep-learning
categories:
  - Investigación
  - Deep Learning
  - Procesos estocásticos
  - Inferencia bayesiana
description: "Estimación de parámetros para difusiones de potencia fraccional mediante un enfoque híbrido bayesiano y de deep learning."
image: cover.png
lang: es
format:
  html:
    image: cover.png
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Figura representativa:** reemplazar `cover.png` por una figura del artículo o subir material complementario a `figures/`.
:::

## Cita

Araya, H., & Plaza-Vega, F. (2023). Parameter estimation for fractional power type diffusion: A hybrid Bayesian-deep learning approach. *Communications in Statistics - Theory and Methods*, 1-21.
